MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Reconsideration of Sanctions issued on 9/16/2002 in the amount of $350.00, to Mary L. Mosley, Esq., is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated.
